content: FilterChip API: FilterChip(selected: Boolean, onClick: () -> Unit, label: @Composable () -> Unit, ...). In LazyRow with contentPadding and horizontalArrangement. Compose Material3 1.4.0 is latest stable (BOM 2026.06.00). For Kotlin 1.9.20, compatible with compose compiler 1.5.5 and BOM ~2024.09.00 which includes material3 1.3.x.
